parameters.query:
WITH current_season AS (
    SELECT max(season::int) AS season
    FROM public.membership_packages
    WHERE season ~ '^[0-9]{4}$'
),
deleted_rows AS (
    DELETE FROM public.raw_members rm
    USING public.membership_packages mp, current_season cs
    WHERE mp.name = rm."Membership"
      AND mp.season ~ '^[0-9]{4}$'
      AND mp.season::int < cs.season
    RETURNING
      rm."Venue ID",
      rm."First name",
      rm."Last name",
      rm."Gender",
      rm."Age",
      rm."Junior",
      rm."Date of birth",
      rm."Membership",
      rm."Payment",
      rm."Cost",
      rm."Paid",
      rm."Paid Credit Card",
      rm."Paid Direct Debit",
      rm."Paid Cash",
      rm."Paid Cheque",
      rm."Paid Other",
      rm."Gift aid",
      rm."Status",
      rm."Start Date",
      rm."Expiry Date",
      rm."Email address",
      rm."Phone number",
      rm."Work number",
      rm."Mobile number",
      rm."Emergency contact name",
      rm."Emergency phone number",
      rm."Address 1",
      rm."Address 2",
      rm."Address 3",
      rm."Town",
      rm."County",
      rm."Country",
      rm."Postcode",
      rm."British Tennis Number",
      rm."Date joined venue",
      rm."Medical history",
      rm."Venue source",
      rm."Contact source",
      rm."Occupation",
      rm."Tags provided",
      rm."Key pin number",
      rm."Registered",
      rm."Member status",
      rm."Receipt of Emails",
      rm."Share Contact Detail",
      rm."Member's Directory",
      rm."Photography",
      rm." Venue source",
      mp.season::int AS snapshot_year
),
inserted_rows AS (
    INSERT INTO public.raw_members_historical (
      "Venue ID",
      "First name",
      "Last name",
      "Gender",
      "Age",
      "Junior",
      "Date of birth",
      "Membership",
      "Payment",
      "Cost",
      "Paid",
      "Paid Credit Card",
      "Paid Direct Debit",
      "Paid Cash",
      "Paid Cheque",
      "Paid Other",
      "Gift aid",
      "Status",
      "Start Date",
      "Expiry Date",
      "Email address",
      "Phone number",
      "Work number",
      "Mobile number",
      "Emergency contact name",
      "Emergency phone number",
      "Address 1",
      "Address 2",
      "Address 3",
      "Town",
      "County",
      "Country",
      "Postcode",
      "British Tennis Number",
      "Date joined venue",
      "Medical history",
      "Venue source",
      "Contact source",
      "Occupation",
      "Tags provided",
      "Key pin number",
      "Registered",
      "Member status",
      "Receipt of Emails",
      "Share Contact Detail",
      "Member's Directory",
      "Photography",
      " Venue source",
      snapshot_year,
      archived_at,
      snapshot_source
    )
    SELECT
      dr."Venue ID",
      dr."First name",
      dr."Last name",
      dr."Gender",
      dr."Age",
      dr."Junior",
      dr."Date of birth",
      dr."Membership",
      dr."Payment",
      dr."Cost",
      dr."Paid",
      dr."Paid Credit Card",
      dr."Paid Direct Debit",
      dr."Paid Cash",
      dr."Paid Cheque",
      dr."Paid Other",
      dr."Gift aid",
      dr."Status",
      dr."Start Date",
      dr."Expiry Date",
      dr."Email address",
      dr."Phone number",
      dr."Work number",
      dr."Mobile number",
      dr."Emergency contact name",
      dr."Emergency phone number",
      dr."Address 1",
      dr."Address 2",
      dr."Address 3",
      dr."Town",
      dr."County",
      dr."Country",
      dr."Postcode",
      dr."British Tennis Number",
      dr."Date joined venue",
      dr."Medical history",
      dr."Venue source",
      dr."Contact source",
      dr."Occupation",
      dr."Tags provided",
      dr."Key pin number",
      dr."Registered",
      dr."Member status",
      dr."Receipt of Emails",
      dr."Share Contact Detail",
      dr."Member's Directory",
      dr."Photography",
      dr." Venue source",
      dr.snapshot_year,
      now(),
      'membership_packages_season'
    FROM deleted_rows dr
    RETURNING snapshot_year
)
SELECT
    (SELECT season FROM current_season) AS current_season,
    COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM inserted_rows), 0) AS moved_row_count,
    (SELECT min(snapshot_year) FROM inserted_rows) AS oldest_moved_season,
    (SELECT max(snapshot_year) FROM inserted_rows) AS newest_moved_season;
